description: Synthesis model for the TNOPSI / DSLO deterministic semantic substrate.

semantic_synthesis: semantic rules operate on atomic nodes
governance_synthesis: validation ensures structural and semantic correctness
mapping_synthesis: internal mappings connect nodes, papers, and graphs
external crosswalks align DSLO with adjacent domains
global_synthesis: substrate meaning emerges from invariant-anchored, structure-aligned, semantically-interpreted corpus elements
all components operate under deterministic, read-only, drift-free guarantees

notes: This v0.1 synthesis block provides a unified integration model across all substrate components.
